name: Shooting Arrows
description: Wall-mounted. Looses an arrow at the first adventurer in its line of sight. Light impact damage plus a poison that bleeds them for 10 seconds. Infinite use. Cannot share a wall segment with a doorway.

name: Bomb
description: A floor charge. When an adventurer strays within 2 tiles a 3-second fuse lights, then it detonates for major damage across a 5-tile radius — friend and foe alike. Single use; it breaks when it blows.

name: Cannon
description: A 2x2 emplacement that fires a cannonball down its facing. Rotate with R before placing. Solid — adventurers and minions must walk around it. Infinite use.

name: Spike Pillar
description: A 2x2 pillar that jabs spikes into every tile within 1 step of its body. Solid — adventurers and minions route around it. Damages anything caught beside it.

name: Dragon Trap
description: Wall-mounted maw that breathes fire at the first adventurer in its line of sight. Heavy fire damage. Infinite use. Cannot share a wall segment with a doorway.

name: Spike Pit
description: A 2x2 disguised pit. The first adventurer to step on it falls onto the spikes for heavy damage, with a chance of instant death. Once sprung it stays open for the rest of the day; it re-hides next night. Must be placed fully inside a room.

name: Rotating Blades
description: A 2x2 hub of constantly spinning blades. Solid body — anything in a tile touching it gets carved up. Never stops, never breaks.

name: Saw Blade
description: A saw that runs back and forth along a straight horizontal track. Heavy damage to anything the blade rolls over. The track stays walkable — time it wrong and you lose a leg.
